top_signals.title: Search for remains of Japanese war dead begins in Taiwan
top_signals.summary: It is the first time since 1975 for the Japanese government to conduct an excavation survey in Taiwan, with which Tokyo does not have diplomatic relations, in search of remains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: PRA and FCA propose new captive insurance regime to drive UK growth and competitiveness
top_signals.summary: Innovative new proposals aim to establish the UK as a centre for the fast-growing captive insurance market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Growth and regulation - speech by Andrew Bailey
top_signals.summary: Given at The Financial and Professional Services Dinner, Mansion House
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin defies recent tech stocks sell-off. Are bulls eyeing a $70K rally?
top_signals.summary: Despite muted derivatives sentiment, Bitcoin’s decoupling and Strategy’s cash raise set the stage for a potential rally to $70,000.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Xpeng says China close to building ‘killer’ rival to Tesla Model Y - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Xpeng says China close to building ‘killer’ rival to Tesla Model Y  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Grayscale could take Worldcoin to Wall Street after ETF filing with the SEC
top_signals.summary: The first exchange-traded fund tied to Worldcoin could soon be headed to U.S. markets, as Grayscale files for a Worldcoin ETF.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Hackers were inside South Korea's diplomat training system for 9 months
top_signals.summary: Unidentified hackers compromised an online education system used by South Korea's diplomatic academy, stealing personal information belonging to former and current employees of the country's Ministry of Foreign Affairs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Lower House members’ assets average ¥32.78 million
top_signals.summary: The figure rose by ¥6.09 million from the previous average disclosed in April 2025.
